texto: I wake upto my catsjudging me.They stareblanklyas if to say,"Is this whatyou had in mindfor your life?If it is, you maywant to considersleeping pills ora tall bridgebecause in our view,you're pathetic."Orthey're hungry.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Pamela August Russell que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “I wake upto my catsjudging me.They stareblanklyas if to say,"Is this whatyou had in mindfor your …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, cats, sandy-dennis-briefly, com foco em sandy-dennis-briefly.
